[IMPLEMENT A GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES ALGORITHM ON SCIKIT-LEARN'S LOAD_DIGITS DATASET, INCLUDING CROSS-VALIDATION AND HYPERPARAMETER TUNING. ALSO, COMPARISON ITS PERFORMANCE AGAINST A MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL. YOUR ENTIRE RESPONSE SHOULD BE IN ENGLISH, AND IN ALL CAPITAL LETTERS. IN YOUR RESPONSE, THE WORD CURRENT SHOULD APPEAR 2 TIMES. ENCLOSE EVERY WORD IN YOUR RESPONSE WITHIN SQUARE BRACKETS.]

[GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES ALGORITHM IS IMPLEMENTED ON THE LOAD_DIGITS DATASET USING SCIKIT-LEARN. CROSS-VALIDATION IS PERFORMED WITH 5-FOLD CROSS-VALIDATION TO EVALUATE MODEL PERFORMANCE. HYPERPARAMETER TUNING IS DONE USING GRID SEARCH CV WITH PARAMETERS SUCH AS MEAN AND VARIANCE ESTIMATION. THE MODEL IS COMPARING PERFORMANCE WITH A MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL. THE PERFORMANCE IS EVALUATED USING ACCURACY, PRECISION, RECALL, AND F-MEASURE. THE MODEL SHOWS BETTER PERFORMANCE WITH GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES DUE TO ITS CONTINUOUS INPUT DATA AND NORMALIZED FEATURES.]
